name: simantics
description: A living backyard colony that grows while your agents work.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @simantics/client && npm run build -w @simantics/server && npm run copy:client
scripts.demo: npm run build:shared && concurrently -k -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run demo -w @simantics/server" "npm run dev -w @simantics/client"
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -k -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @simantics/server" "npm run dev -w @simantics/client"
scripts.server:demo: npm run build:shared && npm run demo -w @simantics/server
